title: AL's Boss Rush
description: A pack that revamps Minecraft's Bosses!
body:
![AL's Boss Rush logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01e2479dcdadb8688891dcfe7c5c1a343aef0b62.png)

# 

A pack that revamps Minecraft's Bosses!

I made this as a more "Modernized-Vanilla style" pack while still giving them a well needed revamp.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Yi-bHjJ9aB4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Features:

*Revamped Ender Dragon

*Revamped Dragon Egg

*2D item sprite for Dragon Egg

*Revamped End Crystal

*Pixel Consistent, Revamped Wither

*Pixel Consistent, Revamped Elder Guardian

*Guardians and Elder Guardians have fins

*Minecraft: Dungeons-inspired Boss Bar designs

*Boss Bar font icons with FULL language support

*Revamped Warden

*5 additional Warden Variants

 

Mod compatibility:

*Unique Guardian and Elder Guardian variants can be found when this pack is used alongside the [Dungeons & Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns) mod/datapack!

 



Make sure that these are all set to "ON":

Custom Entity Models
Random Entities

Emissive Textures

You can find these toggles by going into:

Options>Video Settings>Quality
